report.summary: Day 72 standup v11: MAJOR DELTA — HEAD.lock cleared, batch commit 21aaf5b deployed 170+ pages (18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, OG images, UX fixes). Uncommitted files 824→13. Published slugs 508→528. index.lock still present. Build-v10 shipped Congressional Tokenization Hearing + BitGo IPO guides (~6,000 words). Community-v10 drafted posts #136–138 (Congress recap, BitGo earnings preview, options $14.16B update). MARKET: BTC $70,602 flat. F&G 11 (Extreme Fear — 46+ days). Congressional tokenization hearing completed with bipartisan positive tone. Thu Mar 27 remains convergence day: $14.16B options expiry + SEC 91 ETF rulings. 1,172 page.tsx files (+2). 58 agent runs today ($4,672). P0 RESOLVED (partially): deploy now possible, index.lock remains.

sections.title: Analytics
items: 🚨 MAJOR DELTA — GIT CRISIS PARTIALLY RESOLVED: HEAD.lock removed. Batch commit 21aaf5b landed at 09:26 UTC — 'batch deploy: 170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, OG images, UX fixes'. Uncommitted files dropped from 824 to 13. The 10-day deploy blockade is broken.

DELTA SINCE v10: Build-v10 shipped 2 new learn guides: Congressional Tokenization Hearing Guide 2026 (~3,000 words, House Financial Services hearing, Modernizing Markets Through Tokenization Act + Capital Markets Technology Modernization Act, $26.48B RWA market) + BitGo IPO Guide (~3,000 words, first crypto custody IPO, $BTGO NYSE, $212.8M raised, FY2025 earnings Mar 26). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE (batch 12).

Community-v10 drafted posts #136 (Congressional hearing recap), #137 (BitGo earnings preview), #138 (Options expiry $14.16B update). 2 SVG social cards (Congress Tokenization Recap, BitGo IPO Earnings). Newsletter v23 addendum v10. Calendar v37 (16 posts Wed-Mon).
Design-v10 and EOD-v10 completed full cycles (reports filed).

MARKET (fresh search Mar 25): BTC $70,602 (flat, geopolitical relief rally after Trump postponed Iran strikes 5 days). ETH ~$2,158. F&G 11 (Extreme Fear — 46+ consecutive days below 25). Market cap ~$2.5T. Stablecoins $312B ATH. BTC dominance ~56.5%.

CATALYST UPDATE: Options expiry revised to $14.16B (max pain $75K, BTC at $70.6K = gravitational pull UP). Congressional tokenization hearing completed today with bipartisan positive tone — Nasdaq tokenized securities already approved, CLARITY Act stablecoin deal done 'in principle'. Thu Mar 27: SEC rules on 91 ETF applications (XRP/SOL/LTC/DOGE spot).

LOCAL METRICS: 1,172 page.tsx files (+2 from v10). 528 published slugs (+20 from v10 via batch commit). PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (Congressional Tokenization + BitGo IPO). 13 uncommitted files (down from 824). TS errors: ~142 (stable). index.lock persists.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: 🟢 BLOCKER RESOLVED [P0]: HEAD.lock cleared. Batch commit 21aaf5b deployed 170+ pages to git. Uncommitted files 824→13. Deploy path is OPEN. index.lock still present but not blocking commits.

DONE SINCE v10: Build-v10 shipped Congressional Tokenization Hearing + BitGo IPO (2 pages, ~6,000 words). Community-v10 drafted 3 posts (#136–138) + 2 SVG cards + newsletter v10 + calendar v37. Design-v10 + EOD-v10 completed full cycles.

PIPELINE HEALTH: PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (ready for promotion in next publish cycle). 528 published slugs (+20 via batch). 1,172 page.tsx files. Today's cumulative: 20 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, 24+ OG images, 29+ social posts, 24+ SVG cards, 10+ newsletters, 49+ UX fixes.
REMAINING BLOCKERS: index.lock still present (.git/index.lock from Mar 25 09:58). Next git add/commit will fail unless removed. Jefe action: rm .git/index.lock.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 103+ published slugs missing page.tsx. Ecosystem Pendle page 'use client' — no server Metadata. Rate limiter 0/6 routes. 142 TS errors.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 17 duplicate slugs. ~120 learn pages missing OG images. Vercel deploy needed to push commit 21aaf5b to production.
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×11, build×9, design×10, community×10, publish×8, eod×10 = 58 total.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — VERCEL DEPLOY + CLEAR index.lock: The batch commit is in git but NOT in production yet. Vercel needs to pick up commit 21aaf5b. Also rm .git/index.lock to unblock future commits. The 170+ pages are committed but users still can't see them until Vercel deploys.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE PUBLISH_QUEUE (BATCH 12): Congressional Tokenization Hearing + BitGo IPO are queue-ready. Both are time-sensitive — hearing was today, BitGo earnings tomorrow Mar 26. Promote and deploy ASAP for search capture.

PRIORITY 3 — THURSDAY CONTENT BLITZ: 48 hours to convergence day (Mar 27). $14.16B options expiry + SEC 91 ETF rulings. Ensure fear-greed-timeline, options-calculator, etf-guide, sec-digital-commodities-classification-guide are all in PUBLISHED_PAGES and reachable in production. Community has posts #133–138 scheduled across the event.

STRATEGIC NOTE: The deploy blockade is broken — this is the single biggest operational improvement in 10 days. If Vercel picks up 21aaf5b, we go from ~338 production pages to 500+. That's a 50% increase in indexed surface area hitting Google right before the biggest catalyst week of Q1 2026. F&G at 11 (Extreme Fear, 46+ days) with $312B stablecoins and $14.16B options = coiled spring. Agent spend today: $4,672 across 58 runs. Marginal cost: ~$0.
